items.title: Amazon S3
items.description: Amazon S3 for DVA-C02. Storage classes, versioning, lifecycle policies, presigned URLs, encryption (SSE-S3, SSE-KMS, SSE-C), CORS, event notifications, multipart uploads, and cross-region replication.

items.title: AWS KMS (Key Management Service)
items.description: AWS KMS for DVA-C02. CMKs vs AWS-managed keys, envelope encryption, key policies, grants, key rotation, multi-region keys, and KMS API limits with Java examples.

items.title: Cryptography & Secure Design
items.description: Practical cryptography for software engineers — symmetric and asymmetric encryption, hashing, MACs, digital signatures, TLS internals, key management, and secure coding patterns.

items.title: Database Security
items.description: Authentication, authorization, SQL injection, encryption at rest and in transit, auditing, and security best practices.
